mxcli-llms

mxcli docs for
AI coding assistants

Updated daily from mxcli.org. Optimised for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and Continue.dev.

loading…
The files
Two formats, one source of truth

Both files are rebuilt every day at 02:00 UTC and served from GitHub Pages.

llms.txt
~45 KB  ·  llms.txt-spec index — title, section headers, and one link + blurb per page. Fits comfortably in Claude's context window (~11K tokens). Use this for persistent context in CLAUDE.md or as the source for the /mxcli skill.
View
llms-full.txt
~960 KB  ·  The entire mxcli book as a single Markdown file. Use for RAG-based tools (Cursor, Windsurf, Continue.dev, Copilot) that chunk and embed, or for one-off Claude queries when you need the full reference.
View
Rebuilt daily at 02:00 UTC GitHub  ·  meta.json  ·  Content © mxcli authors
